summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TA Engine Ideas Mode layout fixes. All reported issues have been successfully resolved: Ideas section is no longer cut off, full trade history is visible, page shows complete content without being cut off, chart displays correctly, and all Ideas functionality works perfectly. Layout improvements are working as intended with proper scrolling and height management.
passed_tests: Ideas tab loads correctly with all 3 idea cards visible (BTC, ETH, SOL)
Ideas cards show complete info: BTC 4H Breakout UP, ETH 1D Active, SOL 4H Wrong
Page can scroll to show all content including KEY LEVELS, VERSION TIMELINE sections
Chart displays correctly with Triangle pattern at 78% confidence
EVOLUTION section shows Rectangle → Triangle with dates (Mar 24 → Mar 29)
PROBABILITY section shows AI Breakout 78% +16%, AI Breakdown 18%, Confidence 78%
Filter tabs work correctly (All, Active, Completed, Correct, Wrong)
Replay button is present and functional with replay indicator
ACCURACY card shows 50% with W:1, L:1, All:3 as expected
Chart mode switching works (Idea mode ↔ Performance mode)
Version timeline buttons work (V1, V2) with proper chart updates
All content sections remain accessible after scrolling
Layout fixes implemented: Container, LeftPanel, RightPanel, CardContent, DetailContent styling updated
No content cut-off issues - full page visibility achieved
Proper height management with min-height and overflow-y:auto
All interactive elements clickable and responsive
Performance overlay functionality working in Performance mode
Chart version badge displays correctly (V2 — Triangle 78%)
Key levels section shows Breakout $73,500 and Invalidation $68,200
What Next section displays appropriate guidance
Score section shows accuracy impact correctly

success_percentage.backend: 100% - No backend testing required for this frontend-only task
success_percentage.frontend: 100% - All Ideas tab functionality working perfectly, layout issues resolved
success_percentage.overall: 100% - Complete success, all reported issues fixed
